heroSubtitle: We control every stage of the production process, ensuring quality, sustainability, and full traceability.

sections.title: Responsible Production
text: We apply sustainable agronomic criteria in pest and disease control, prioritizing environmentally respectful methods.
We promote biodiversity and natural balance across our farms as part of a responsible and committed agricultural model.

sections.title: Production Systems
text: We integrate advanced agricultural technology to optimize water and energy resource usage.
Our crops comply with leading international quality and food safety standards.

sections.title: Selection and Harvesting
text: Harvesting takes place at the optimal stage of ripeness to preserve flavor, texture, and shelf life.
Our technical team continuously monitors each plot throughout the season.

sections.title: Traceability
text: We ensure full product traceability from origin to final customer, guaranteeing transparency and control at every stage.

sections.title: Handling and Packaging
text: Automated processes and continuous quality controls ensure consistency and excellence in the final product.

sections.title: Distribution
text: Our logistics operations are designed to efficiently serve national and international markets while maintaining cold chain integrity and product quality.

sections.title: The Consumer
text: Our ultimate commitment is to deliver fresh, safe, and premium-quality fruit tailored to the demands of each market.
